title: thelypteris inaequilobata
intro: Thelypteris inaequilobata is a species of fern native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris inaequilobata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
